title: BOTI Pockets
description: Bigger On The Inside Pockets. Adds a Big Pocket
body:
Have you ever been playing minecraft and thought "Man i wish i had Bigger On The Inside Pockets, just like The Doctor has." Well now you can!

# Overview
this mod adds an easily crafted pocket item which has a much larger inventory than one might expect. If you want a quick and easy inventory expansion item, this is it!

![Pocket UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F820kZtm/images/868df03ce79148c7ae8204040aa843944d49c1b3.png)
